title: The Keys to Robin’s Rescue
description: In the Enies Lobby Climax storyline, this section centers on Unknown person #1, Spandam, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3 as the scene develops across pages 1–4.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It turned into Bubbles and disap- peared...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: If you don't solve this mystery...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You have no chance of winning.

dialogue.speaker: Spandam
dialogue.text: B-But even by knowing my ability,

dialogue.speaker: Spandam
dialogue.text: It doesn't mean you can win!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: But isn't it rather inconvenient for battles?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: !? The Bubbles from the Bathtub are....!!
